<!-- generated by design-md v1.1.0 -->

# Design Language ‚Äî "Quiet Registry"

A near-monochrome catalog on the **Geist / Geistdocs surface system**, expressed through **shadcn semantic tokens** in [app/globals.css](app/globals.css) ‚Äî but **warm, not neutral**: the whole gray ladder carries a whisper of "oat" (OKLCH hue 85‚Äì90, chroma ‚â§0.01) so the registry reads as paper rather than app chrome. Warm off-white canvas (`background-200`) under near-white cards (`background-100`); in dark mode an **espresso charcoal** (background-100 at L 0.145, never pure `#000`). Geist material shadows (1px ring + soft lift) instead of flat borders, with shadow/hairline blacks tinted to the same temperature. **Single type family**: Geist Sans everywhere ‚Äî headings are the same sans, tighter and at a deliberately lighter display weight ‚Äî with Geist Mono for code and wayfinding, and Geist Pixel reserved for rare standout moments. Sections are 12-column grids with asymmetric heading/lead splits.

> **Status:** migrated (July 2026). Fonts, type roles, pill CTAs, and home-section anatomy match this contract. Legacy `text-body` / `text-label` / `text-caption` aliases remain in [app/globals.css](app/globals.css) for form primitives ‚Äî prefer the new ladder in new UI.

> One-liner for handing to another surface: Geist Sans for everything (`font-sans`) ‚Äî headings are the same family with `[--font-weight-semibold:450]` and `tracking-tighter` at display sizes, never a second display font. Geist Mono (`font-mono`) for code, file trees, command bars, and `[ 01 ]` step markers; Geist Pixel (Square) for at most one standout display moment per page. Geist gray scale via `--ds-*` mapped into shadcn tokens ‚Äî hierarchy from the gray ladder (`text-gray-1000` ‚Üí `900` ‚Üí `700`), zero accent hue (status dots are the sanctioned exception). Sections: `grid grid-cols-12 gap-x-6` with asymmetric heading/lead splits. Cards `rounded-xl bg-card shadow-surface`; CTAs `rounded-full`; framed panels get gradient hairline borders; dense regions end in edge fades, never hard crops. Entrances: `animate-enter` + `--stagger`; every transition enumerates properties and carries `motion-reduce`.

The canonical surfaces are the home hero ([components/home-hero.tsx](components/home-hero.tsx)) and the listing card ([components/listing-card.tsx](components/listing-card.tsx)). Primitives live in [components/ui/](components/ui/); tokens and utilities are in [app/globals.css](app/globals.css).

---

## Adding UI (shadcn OOTB playbook)

1. Add with the project runner (never overwrite `globals.css` token values):
   ```bash
   pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add <name> -y
   # If prompted to overwrite button.tsx / globals.css ‚Üí answer no
   ```
2. Prefer semantic classes only: `bg-card`, `text-muted-foreground`, `border-border`, `ring-ring`. For text hierarchy inside marketing/landing surfaces, the Geist gray ladder aliases (`text-gray-1000/900/700`, defined in the `@theme` block) are also sanctioned.
3. Elevated surfaces: `shadow-surface` / `hover:shadow-surface-hover` (or stock `shadow-sm`/`shadow-md`/`shadow-lg` ‚Äî they map to Geist materials in `@theme`). Prefer **no** flat `border` for card edges.
4. Radii: `rounded-xl` panels, `rounded-full` CTAs/pills, `rounded-md` chips/badges/inline code.
5. Structured content ‚Üí `Card` + `CardHeader` / `CardTitle` / `CardDescription` / `CardContent`. Freeform panels ‚Üí `Surface`.
6. Chips ‚Üí `Badge` (`variant="outline"` | `"secondary"`). Buttons ‚Üí `buttonVariants` / `Button` / `ButtonLink`.
7. Icons ‚Üí Hugeicons (`@hugeicons/react` + `@hugeicons/core-free-icons`), matching `components.json` `iconLibrary`. **Convention: 16px default, 1.5px stroke, `currentColor`.** In buttons use `data-icon="inline-start|inline-end"`; do not size icons inside primitives.
8. Do **not** let the CLI rewrite `:root` / `--ds-*` / shadcn semantic mappings in [app/globals.css](app/globals.css).

---

## 1. Foundations

### Fonts

All three families come from the `geist` npm package (already in [package.json](package.json)) and are wired to Tailwind in the `@theme` block of [app/globals.css](app/globals.css). Loading lives in [app/layout.tsx](app/layout.tsx).

- **Geist Sans** (`geist/font/sans` ‚Üí `--font-geist-sans` ‚Üí `font-sans`) ‚Äî the only text family. Body, UI, **and headings**: there is no display font. Headings differentiate by size, tracking, and the display-weight hack (below)
- **Geist Mono** (`geist/font/mono` ‚Üí `--font-geist-mono` ‚Üí `font-mono`) ‚Äî code, file trees/contents, command bars, inline path chips, and `[ 01 ]` step markers
- **Geist Pixel Square** (`geist/font/pixel` ‚Üí `--font-geist-pixel-square` ‚Üí `font-pixel`) ‚Äî decorative display only. **Budget: at most one pixel-font moment per page** (a hero word, a section stamp). Never for body, labels, buttons, or headings that carry information hierarchy

Display-weight rule: at `text-heading-40` and above, headings use `[--font-weight-semibold:450] tracking-tighter` ‚Äî a slightly _lighter_ semibold, not bold. Below that, regular semibold with `-0.02em` tracking.

### Color

Two layers in [app/globals.css](app/globals.css):

1. **Geist foundation, warm-tinted** ‚Äî `--ds-background-*`, `--ds-gray-*`, `--ds-gray-alpha-*`, `--ds-red-*`, `--ds-blue-700` (focus ring only)
2. **shadcn semantics** ‚Äî `--background`, `--card`, `--muted`, ‚Ä¶ mapped onto those `--ds-*` values (same approach as Geistdocs ‚Üí Fumadocs)

**Temperature contract (decided July 2026):** the gray ladder is _warm_, not neutral ‚Äî every `--ds-background-*` / `--ds-gray-*` value sits at OKLCH hue 85‚Äì90 with chroma tapered from ~0.001 near white to ‚â§0.01 in the midtones. Lightness values match the stock Geist ladder, so contrast relationships are unchanged. Alpha hairlines and `--ds-shadow-*` blacks are rebased on the same warm ink (`oklch(0.2 0.02‚Äì0.03 90 / a)`; warm white in dark mode). Dark mode is espresso: `background-100` at L 0.145, `background-200` at L 0.168 ‚Äî do **not** "fix" it back to pure black. The tint must read as temperature, never as color: if you can name the canvas color, chroma is too high.

Accent budget stays **zero for product UI** ‚Äî no brand hue on surfaces. Chromatic tokens: `--destructive` (`--ds-red-800`), the blue focus ring on `--ds-focus-ring`, and **status dots** (`size-2 rounded-full` in cyan/warning/gray-500 for running/stopping/stopped) ‚Äî chromatic color signals data semantics, never branding.

| Role | Token / class | Geist source |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Page canvas | `bg-background` | `--ds-background-200` |
| Cards / popovers | `bg-card` / `bg-popover` | `--ds-background-100` |
| Inset / subdued | `bg-muted` | `--ds-gray-100` |
| Primary text | `text-foreground` / `text-gray-1000` | `--ds-gray-1000` |
| Secondary text | `text-muted-foreground` / `text-gray-900` | `--ds-gray-800/900` |
| Quiet / tertiary text | `text-gray-700` | `--ds-gray-700` |
| Step-marker brackets | `text-gray-500` | `--ds-gray-500` |
| Primary action | `bg-primary text-primary-foreground` | gray-1000 / background-100 |
| Hairlines | `border-border` | `--ds-gray-alpha-400` |
| Danger | `text-destructive` | `--ds-red-800` |
| Docs (Fumadocs) | `--color-fd-*` | same Geist scale (see globals) |

No hardcoded colors in components. Sanctioned exceptions: rgba values inside `--ds-shadow-*` definitions, and `color-mix()` hover derivations in [components/ui/button.tsx](components/ui/button.tsx).

### Elevation

Geist **material shadows** (border ring + lift + optional background ring):

| Utility / Tailwind | Geist source | Use |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `.shadow-surface` | `--ds-shadow-border-medium` | Cards, listing panels |
| `.shadow-surface-hover` / `.shadow-surface-active` | `--ds-shadow-border-large` | Hover / selected |
| `.shadow-chip` / `shadow-sm` | `--ds-shadow-border-small` | Chips, inputs, light elevated controls |
| `.shadow-button` | `--ds-shadow-button` | Solid primary fills (dark CTA / badge) |
| `shadow-md` | `--ds-shadow-border-medium` | Stock shadcn medium |
| `shadow-lg` / `shadow-xl` | `--ds-shadow-menu` / `--ds-shadow-modal` | Menus, dialogs |
| `.material-*` | same family | Explicit Geistdocs-style surfaces |

Never re-inline `shadow-[...]`. Flat `border` is for hairline separators (`border-b border-border` on header/footer/hero), not card outlines.

---

## 2. Surfaces & rounding

`--radius: 0.5rem` (8px, Geist `--radius-lg`); scale derives in `@theme`.

| Radius         | Use for                                     |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `rounded-xl`   | cards, panels, `Surface` (‚âà12px)            |
| `rounded-full` | CTAs, pills, command bars                   |
| `rounded-md`   | badges, chips, inline code (‚âà6px materials) |

Recipes:

- **Card** ‚Äî `rounded-xl bg-card p-5 shadow-surface transition-[box-shadow,transform,background-color] duration-200 hover:shadow-surface-hover active:scale-[0.99]` ([components/listing-card.tsx](components/listing-card.tsx))
- **Panel** ‚Äî `Surface` ([components/ui/surface.tsx](components/ui/surface.tsx)); `inset` ‚Üí `bg-muted/30`, `interactive` adds hover/press
- **Framed panel (gradient hairline)** ‚Äî instead of a uniform border, a 1px mask-composited overlay that fades downward: absolutely-positioned pseudo-layer with `padding: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--ds-gray-alpha-400), transparent); mask: linear-gradient(white, white) content-box exclude, linear-gradient(white, white)`
- **Chip** ‚Äî `rounded-md bg-background px-2 py-0.5 text-caption text-muted-foreground shadow-chip`
- **Inline code chip** ‚Äî filenames/paths inside headings and copy: `rounded-md border border-gray-400 bg-background-100 px-2 py-0.5 font-mono` at label size
- **Edge fades, never hard crops** ‚Äî dense or clipped regions end with a gradient overlay (`bg-linear-to-t from-background-200 to-transparent`, or the horizontal/`background-100` equivalents matching the underlying canvas)
- **Gradient hairline `<hr>`** ‚Äî dividers dissolve at the edges: `h-px border-0 bg-[linear-gradient(to_right,transparent_0%,var(--ds-gray-400)_10%,var(--ds-gray-400)_90%,transparent_100%)]`
- **Hero band** ‚Äî centered stack (logo ‚Üí headline ‚Üí lead ‚Üí audience toggle ‚Üí command bar ‚Üí preview) with `border-b border-border` on a flat canvas ([components/home-hero.tsx](components/home-hero.tsx))

---

## 3. Typography patterns

Target ladder is the Geist role system (see Migration status for the current `@theme` state). Roles are named `text-heading-N` / `text-copy-N` / `text-label-N` (+ `-mono` variants), where `N` is the px size; headings carry negative tracking, copy roles carry comfortable line heights, label roles are single-line.

| Role | Sizes | Use |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `text-heading-64/56/40/32/24` | 64‚Üí24px, `-0.02` to `-0.04em`, weight 450 at ‚â•40 | Hero (`40 ‚Üí md:64`), section (`32 ‚Üí lg:56`), card titles |
| `text-copy-24/18/16/14` | reading sizes with relaxed leading | Lead paragraphs (`16 ‚Üí lg:18`), body, descriptions |
| `text-label-14/13/12` | single-line UI labels | Buttons, nav, metadata |
| `text-label-13-mono` / `text-label-12-mono` / `text-copy-14-mono` | mono variants | File trees, command bars, step markers, code chips |

| Element | Classes |
| --- | --- |
| Hero title | `text-heading-40 md:text-heading-64 [--font-weight-semibold:450] text-balance text-gray-1000` |
| Section title | `text-heading-32 lg:text-heading-56 [--font-weight-semibold:450] text-balance` |
| Lead paragraph | `text-copy-16 lg:text-copy-18 text-gray-900 text-balance` |
| Card title | `text-copy-14 font-medium text-gray-1000` |
| Body / description | `text-copy-14 text-gray-900 text-pretty` |
| Step marker (wayfinding) | `[ 01 ]` ‚Äî `text-label-12-mono`, brackets `text-gray-500`, digits `text-gray-700` |
| Inline path chip | `rounded-md border border-gray-400 bg-background-100 px-2 py-0.5 font-mono` at label-13 |
| Dynamic counts | `tabular-nums` |

Wayfinding is **mono step markers, not uppercase kickers** ‚Äî the numbered `[ 01 ]` motif replaces `uppercase tracking-[0.16em]` eyebrows in new sections (legacy kickers remain until migrated).

Copy voice: short, imperative, sentence case, no exclamation marks ‚Äî "Explore agents", "Open composer", "View all". Base layer already handles `text-balance` on headings and `text-wrap: pretty` on paragraphs; `antialiased` is set on `<html>` in [app/layout.tsx](app/layout.tsx).

---

## 4. Layout & spacing

- Viewport: sticky blurred header (`sticky top-0 z-40 bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-md`, [components/site-header.tsx](components/site-header.tsx)) ‚Üí `main.flex-1` ‚Üí footer ‚Äî catalog chrome lives under `app/(site)/`
- Docs: Fumadocs `DocsLayout` at `/docs` with the same Geist/shadcn tokens (no second theme)
- Container: `mx-auto max-w-6xl px-6`; prose/detail pages use `PageShell narrow` (`max-w-3xl`) ([components/page-shell.tsx](components/page-shell.tsx))
- **Section anatomy: 12-column grid with asymmetric splits.** Sections are `grid grid-cols-12 items-start gap-x-6`; the `h2` sits in cols 1‚Äì5/6 and the lead paragraph in cols 7/8‚Äì13. The off-balance tension is a signature ‚Äî don't center section headers
- Vertical rhythm is generous and stepped: heroes `pt-16 md:pt-24 lg:pt-28`; sections `pt-18 md:pt-24 lg:pt-30` with `pb-18 md:pb-24 lg:pb-30`; between-block gaps step `gap-12 md:gap-16 lg:gap-18` (hero-scale: `gap-20 md:gap-30 lg:gap-42`)
- Card grids: `grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3`
- In-card rhythm: `mt-1.5` (kicker), `mt-3` (body), `mt-4` (chips), chip gap `gap-1.5`
- The home hero is a centered product intro: brand mark, one headline, one lead, audience toggle (`For humans | For agents`), copyable command bar, and a tabbed code/preview specimen ‚Äî not bottom-anchored

---

## 5. Components & motifs

Core kit in [components/ui/](components/ui/): `button`, `button-link`, `card`, `badge`, `input`, `textarea`, `label`, `separator`, `tabs`, `dialog`, `dropdown-menu`, `popover`, `tooltip`, `scroll-area`, `select`, `checkbox`, `switch`, `surface`.

- **Buttons** ‚Äî `buttonVariants` / `Button` / `ButtonLink`. Variants: `default` (+ `shadow-button`), `outline` (`shadow-surface`), `secondary` (+ `shadow-chip`), `ghost`, `destructive`, `link`. **CTAs are pills (`rounded-full`)**; primary = gray-1000 on background-100. Press = `active:scale-[0.96]`; focus = `focus-visible:ring-3 ring-ring/30`
- **Command bar** ‚Äî [components/command-bar.tsx](components/command-bar.tsx): pill `rounded-full bg-card shadow-chip` with a `text-gray-700` mono `$` prefix, mono command text, and a copy button whose icon swaps (see Motion)
- **Home hero preview** ‚Äî [components/home-hero-preview.tsx](components/home-hero-preview.tsx): text tabs with active `bg-card shadow-chip`, dual `rounded-xl` code/preview windows
- **Card / Surface** ‚Äî `Card` for structured content; `Surface` for freeform panels. Both: `rounded-xl bg-card shadow-surface`
- **Listing cards** ‚Äî `AgentCard` / `ExtensionCard` ([components/listing-card.tsx](components/listing-card.tsx)); chips via `Badge`; title underlines on group hover
- **Hover-reveal affordance** ‚Äî link tiles show an arrow icon top-right only on hover: `absolute right-3 top-3 opacity-0 transition-opacity group-hover:opacity-100`
- **Status dots** ‚Äî `size-2 shrink-0 rounded-full` + label; cyan = running, warning = stopping, `bg-gray-500` = stopped
- **Badge** ‚Äî `text-caption` on material chips (`outline` / `secondary`); cap visible integration chips at 4 with `+n` tabular-nums
- **Inputs** ‚Äî `Input` / `Textarea` / `SelectTrigger`: `rounded-lg bg-card shadow-chip`, focus ring
- **Overlays** ‚Äî Dialog / Popover / Dropdown / Select menus: `rounded-xl` + `shadow-lg`/`shadow-xl` (Geist menu/modal)
- **Background texture** ‚Äî page canvas is flat Geist `background-200`; `.surface-grid` is available but unused on the home hero
- **Icons** ‚Äî Hugeicons (`components.json` ‚Üí `iconLibrary: "hugeicons"`); **16px default, 1.5px stroke, `currentColor`**
- **Tooltip** ‚Äî wrap the app with `TooltipProvider` ([app/layout.tsx](app/layout.tsx))
- **Ad inventory** ‚Äî [components/ad-slot.tsx](components/ad-slot.tsx)
- **Guides (Fumadocs)** ‚Äî `fumadocs-ui/css/shadcn.css` + `preset.css`; fd tokens follow shadcn, with docs canvas overridden to `--ds-background-100`. MDX code fences use path titles (`title="agent/..."`)

---

## 6. Motion

- **Entrance** ‚Äî `.animate-enter` (translateY 8px + blur 5px + fade, 700ms) with inline `style={{ "--stagger": n }}` at 90ms steps. Stagger meaningful chunks, never whole containers
- **Hover/press** ‚Äî `hover:shadow-surface-hover` + `active:scale-[0.99]` on cards; `active:scale-[0.96]` on buttons
- **Scroll-step dimming** ‚Äî in scrollytelling sections, inactive steps sit at `opacity-40` with `transition-opacity duration-300`, sticky at `top: 96px` (matches `scroll-padding-top`)
- **Icon swap** (copy ‚Üí check) ‚Äî two stacked icons cross-fading with paired `opacity` + `scale` (100/50%), 200ms, ease `cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1)`
- **Width/reveal transitions** ‚Äî 400ms `cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1)`
- **Transitions** ‚Äî always enumerate properties (no `transition-all`)
- **Scroll** ‚Äî `scroll-behavior: smooth` on `html`; `scroll-padding-top: 5rem` for sticky chrome
- **Reduced motion** ‚Äî every animated property carries `motion-reduce:transition-none` (or lives under `motion-safe:`); `.animate-enter` and smooth scroll are disabled under `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` in [app/globals.css](app/globals.css)

---

## 7. Checklist (per page)

- [ ] Content in `mx-auto max-w-6xl px-6` (or `PageShell` / `PageShell narrow`); section headers use the 12-col asymmetric split (heading cols 1‚Äì5/6, lead cols 7/8‚Äì13)
- [ ] One type family: headings are `font-sans` with `[--font-weight-semibold:450]` + tighter tracking at display sizes ‚Äî no Bricolage, no second display font
- [ ] `font-pixel` appears at most once per page, and only decoratively
- [ ] Colors come from shadcn tokens or the Geist gray ladder (`text-gray-1000/900/700`); no one-off hex/oklch in components
- [ ] Card edges use `shadow-surface` / `shadow-chip` or a gradient hairline overlay ‚Äî not flat `border` or inline `shadow-[...]`. Solid primary fills use `shadow-button`
- [ ] Radii: `rounded-xl` cards, `rounded-full` CTAs, `rounded-md` chips/inline code
- [ ] Wayfinding uses mono `[ 01 ]` step markers (gray-500 brackets / gray-700 digits), not uppercase kickers; counts use `tabular-nums`
- [ ] Clipped or dense regions end in an edge fade matching the canvas, never a hard crop
- [ ] Buttons come from `buttonVariants`/`ButtonLink`, never hand-rolled; icons are Hugeicons at 16px/1.5px stroke
- [ ] Entrances use `animate-enter` + `--stagger`; transitions enumerate properties (no `transition-all`) and carry `motion-reduce`

---

## Remaining follow-ups

Migrated: Geist fonts ([app/layout.tsx](app/layout.tsx)), type-role ladder + mono utilities ([app/globals.css](app/globals.css)), pill CTAs ([components/ui/button.tsx](components/ui/button.tsx)), home 12-col sections + `StepMarker` ([app/(site)/page.tsx](<app/(site)/page.tsx>), [components/step-marker.tsx](components/step-marker.tsx)), listing/header/footer typography.

Still optional:

1. Replace remaining `text-body` / `text-label` / `text-caption` call sites in form primitives and asides with the new ladder, then delete the legacy aliases
2. Add a status-dot recipe when a surface needs it
3. Use `.hairline-fade` / `.edge-fade-b` on dense panels as they appear

---

## Open questions

- Which Geist Pixel variant moments make sense for this product (hero wordmark? section stamps?) ‚Äî Square is the default; revisit if a different variant reads better at small sizes
- Chart token blocks exist in globals with no chart components yet ‚Äî add when needed
